meta_title: For Founders: idea validation to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to idea validation and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Idea Validation to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to perform rapid idea validation and overcome a lack of portfolio. An advanced checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to build SaaS revenue.
content.answer_block: Stop building for a portfolio; start building for revenue. Use rapid idea validation to identify high-intent market gaps. By deploying lean MVPs via Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform theoretical concepts into live, monetizable assets that prove your competence to future clients and investors instantly.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You are staring at a lack of portfolio, paralyzed by the fear that without a track record, you are invisible to the market. But the market doesn't care about your resume—it cares about its own pain. 

True authority isn't granted by past projects; it's forged by solving real-world problems at speed. We are going to bypass the 'portfolio trap' entirely by pivoting to aggressive idea validation. You will stop being a developer seeking permission and start being a founder delivering value.

steps.title: Identify the High-Intent Micro-Niche
steps.description: Don't build a generic SaaS. Use market data to find a specific pain point in a vertical with high willingness to pay.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current market landscape for [Niche] and identify three specific, underserved pain points where a SaaS solution could generate $500/mo in recurring revenue within 30 days.

steps.title: Build the 'Concierge' Landing Page
steps.description: Validate demand before writing a single line of production code. Build a landing page that captures intent.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a high-converting landing page structure for a [Product_Name] that focuses on the 'pain-to-gain' transition. Include a waitlist form and a clear value proposition.

steps.title: Deploy the 'Smoke Test' MVP
steps.description: Create a functional, single-feature prototype that performs the core value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal CRUD application for [Core_Feature] using Supabase and Next.js. Focus on speed and security, ignoring aesthetic polish for now.

steps.title: Automate Outreach and Feedback Loops
steps.description: Integrate feedback collection directly into the user flow to iterate based on real usage data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script that integrates feedback collection into the app flow and triggers an automated email sequence via Resend when a user completes the core action.

steps.title: Iterate to Revenue
steps.description: Use the usage data from your MVP to optimize the conversion funnel and secure your first paying user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current user drop-off points in the [App_Feature] flow and suggest specific UI/UX changes to improve the conversion rate by 20%.

pro_tips: Never build an auth system from scratch; use Clerk or Supabase to save 20+ hours of boilerplate.
The 'portfolio' is an output of a successful business, not a prerequisite. Focus on the P&L statement, not the GitHub graph.
Ship the MVP in under 48 hours. If it takes longer, you are over-engineering, not validating.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your core revenue-driving logic before you push to production.
Always include a 'Request a Feature' button. It’s the easiest way to identify your next revenue stream.
content.next_steps: Once you have your first 10 waitlist signups, use Claude Code to build the full production version and implement Stripe billing immediately.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the 'right time' to build your reputation. Your portfolio is built through the products you ship and the problems you solve for real users. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
